   480	        goto: step_read_state
   481	
   482	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   483	  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS
   484	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   485	  phase_synthesis:
   486	    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into final research/research.md
   487	    steps:
   488	
   489	      step_hydrate_summary_metrics:
   490	        action: "Hydrate summary metrics before synthesis"
   491	        read:
   492	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-config.json"
   493	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-state.jsonl"
   494	          - "{spec_folder}/research/findings-registry.json"
   495	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-strategy.md"
   496	        extract:
   497	          - iteration_count: "Count lines where type === 'iteration'"
   498	          - current_iteration: "iteration_count + 1"
   499	          - current_segment: "Latest segment_start event segment, else 1"
   500	          - last_focus: "Extract focus from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
   501	          - ratio_prev: "Extract newInfoRatio from second-latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   502	          - ratio_latest: "Extract newInfoRatio from latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   503	          - remaining_questions: "Count unchecked items in 'Key Questions'"
   504	          - remaining_questions_list: "List unchecked key questions from strategy.md"
   505	          - answered_count: "Count answered questions from strategy.md"
   506	          - total_questions: "Count total questions tracked in strategy.md"
   507	          - last_3_summaries: "Summarize the latest 3 iteration records as 'run N: focus (ratio)'"
   508	          - reason: "Use the latest synthesis/recovery stop reason if present, else the frozen default 'converged'. (Must be a member of the STOP_REASONS enum: converged, maxIterationsReached, blockedStop, stuckRecovery, error, manualStop, userPaused.)"
   509	
   510	      step_read_all_iterations:
   511	        action: "Read all iteration files and strategy"
   512	        read_pattern: "{spec_folder}/research/iterations/iteration-*.md"
   513	        read_also: "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-strategy.md"
   514	
   515	      step_compile_research:
   516	        action: "Compile or finalize research/research.md"
   517	        instructions: |
   518	          If research/research.md exists (progressive synthesis was active):
   519	            1. Read current research/research.md
   520	            2. Consolidate and deduplicate findings across all iterations

exec
/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba .opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml | sed -n '360,520p'" in /Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public
 succeeded in 0ms:
   360	
   361	      step_graph_convergence:
   362	        action: "Evaluate coverage-graph convergence before the inline review convergence vote"
   363	        inspect:
   364	          - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl"
   365	          - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-findings-registry.json"
   366	        transform: |
   367	          1. Call graph convergence on the current review lineage before the inline 3-signal vote.
   368	          2. Record the decision as one of CONTINUE, STOP_ALLOWED, STOP_BLOCKED.
   369	          3. Preserve raw graph signals and blockers for reducer rollup and blocked-stop evidence.
   370	          4. Normalize blockers to both JSON array and CSV forms for downstream stop handling.
   371	          5. Set graph_stop_blocked = true only when graph_decision == "STOP_BLOCKED".
   372	        mcp_tool:
   373	          name: mcp__spec_kit_memory__deep_loop_graph_convergence
   374	          note: "Call directly - NEVER through Code Mode. Review-side graph convergence must run before the inline review stop vote."
   375	          parameters: { specFolder: "{spec_folder}", loopType: "review", sessionId: "{session_id}" }
   376	        append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"graph_convergence","mode":"review","run":{current_iteration},"decision":"{graph_decision}","signals":{graph_signals_json},"blockers":{graph_blockers_json},"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{session_id}","generation":{generation}}'
   377	        outputs:
   378	          - graph_decision: "CONTINUE | STOP_ALLOWED | STOP_BLOCKED"
   379	          - graph_signals_json: "JSON object returned by deep_loop_graph_convergence"
   380	          - graph_blockers_json: "JSON array of graph blockers when present, else []"
   381	          - graph_blockers_csv: "Comma-separated blocker summary when graph blocks STOP, else empty string"
   382	          - graph_stop_blocked: "Boolean true when graph_decision == STOP_BLOCKED"
   383	
   384	      step_check_convergence:
   385	        action: "Evaluate graph-assisted review stop conditions and the legal-stop decision tree"
   386	        algorithm: |
   387	          0. CLAIM-ADJUDICATION PRE-CHECK (universal STOP veto; runs before hard stops and composite convergence):
   388	             claim_adjudication_gate_pass = (last_claim_adjudication_passed != false) OR (p0_count + p1_count == 0)
   389	             If claim_adjudication_gate_pass == false:
   390	               candidate_decision = "BLOCKED"
   391	               stop_blocked = true
   392	               stopReason = "blockedStop"
   393	               blocked_gates = ["claimAdjudicationGate"]
   394	               recovery_strategy = "Reviewer must add typed claim-adjudication packets (claim, evidenceRefs, counterevidenceSought, alternativeExplanation, finalSeverity, confidence, downgradeTrigger) for every active P0/P1 finding before STOP is allowed."
   395	               Skip hard stops (1) and composite convergence (4); proceed directly to step 5 legal-stop decision-tree assembly so blocked_by_json, gate outputs, and the blocked_stop event still populate consistently.
   396	          1. HARD STOPS (each still subject to step 5 legal-stop gates, including claimAdjudicationGate):
   397	             a) if iteration_count >= max_iterations: mark hard_stop_reason = "max_iterations_reached" and promote to STOP candidate
   398	             b) if all dimensions clean AND required traceability protocols are covered AND p0_count == 0 AND p1_count == 0 AND coverage_age >= 1 AND all quality gates pass (evidence: every P0/P1 has file:line; scope: all findings within target; coverage: all dimensions reviewed): mark hard_stop_reason = "all_dimensions_clean" and promote to STOP candidate
   399	             A hard stop does NOT bypass the legal-stop decision tree; it must still pass step 5 including the claim-adjudication gate.
   400	          2. STUCK DETECTION (threshold 2):
   401	             if stuck_count >= 2: STUCK_RECOVERY
   402	          3. GRAPH CONVERGENCE PREREQUISITE:
   403	               graph_decision, graph_signals_json, and graph_blockers_json are already populated by step_graph_convergence.
   404	               Final STOP is never legal unless the inline review vote says STOP AND graph_decision == "STOP_ALLOWED".
   405	               If graph_decision == "STOP_BLOCKED", set stop_blocked = true and route through blocked_stop emission instead of stopping.
   406	          4. COMPOSITE CONVERGENCE (3-signal weighted vote with split thresholds):
   407	               signals = []
   408	               a) Rolling average (w=0.30, window=2, needs 2+ iterations):
   409	                  avg = mean(last 2 newFindingsRatios)
   410	                  stop if avg <= 0.08
   411	               b) MAD noise floor (w=0.25, needs 3+ iterations):
   412	                  noiseFloor = MAD(all ratios) * 1.4826
   413	                  stop if latest ratio <= noiseFloor
   414	               c) Dimension coverage (w=0.45):
   415	                  coverage = dimensions_covered / total_dimensions
   416	                  stop if coverage >= 1.0 AND required traceability protocols are covered AND coverage_age >= 1
   417	               Redistribute weights for unavailable signals.
   418	               if latest ratio <= 0.05: mark no_progress_threshold_reached
   419	               if weighted_stop_score >= 0.60: inline STOP becomes a candidate and binary gates must run
   420	          5. LEGAL-STOP DECISION TREE (review-specific gates; runs whenever step 0 or a hard stop or the composite vote promotes STOP to a candidate):
   421	               a) convergenceGate: pass when a hard-stop condition is met OR weighted_stop_score >= 0.60; record score
   422	               b) dimensionCoverageGate: pass when configured dimensions and required traceability coverage are complete and coverage_age >= 1; record covered and missing dimensions
   423	               c) p0ResolutionGate: pass when activeP0 == 0; record activeP0
   424	               d) evidenceDensityGate: pass when every active P0/P1 has concrete file:line evidence and no active P0/P1 relies only on inference; record avgEvidencePerFinding
   425	               e) hotspotSaturationGate: pass when review hotspots have been revisited enough times to satisfy the saturation heuristic
   426	               f) claimAdjudicationGate: pass when claim_adjudication_gate_pass == true (i.e. last_claim_adjudication_passed != false OR there are no active P0/P1 findings to adjudicate); record last_claim_adjudication_passed and claim_adjudication_active_count
   427	             if STOP is a candidate and any gate fails:
   428	               decision = "BLOCKED"
   429	               stop_blocked = true
   430	               stopReason = "blockedStop"
   431	               blocked_by_json = JSON array of failing gate names (always include "claimAdjudicationGate" when claim_adjudication_gate_pass == false)
   432	               blocked_by_csv = comma-separated list of failing gate names
   433	               convergence_gate_pass = boolean
   434	               convergence_gate_score = numeric convergence score
   435	               dimension_coverage_gate_pass = boolean
   436	               dimension_coverage_gate_covered_json = JSON array of covered review dimensions
   437	               dimension_coverage_gate_missing_json = JSON array of missing review dimensions
   438	               p0_resolution_gate_pass = boolean
   439	               active_p0_count = number of active P0 findings
   440	               evidence_density_gate_pass = boolean
   441	               avg_evidence_per_finding = numeric evidence density
   442	               hotspot_saturation_gate_pass = boolean
   443	               claim_adjudication_gate_pass = boolean
   444	               claim_adjudication_active_count = numeric count of active P0/P1 at the gate
   445	               recovery_strategy = one-line hint describing the next review action needed to satisfy the failed gates (when claimAdjudicationGate is the failing gate, prefer the step-0 recovery_strategy already set)
   446	          6. COMBINED STOP RULE:
   447	               a) if STOP is legal AND graph_decision == "STOP_ALLOWED": decision = "STOP"
   448	               b) if STOP is legal AND graph_decision == "STOP_BLOCKED":
   449	                    decision = "BLOCKED"
   450	                    stop_blocked = true
   451	                    stopReason = "blockedStop"
   452	                    # Phase 008 P1-02 closure: blockedBy must be string[] per the
   453	                    # published review blocked-stop contract. Extract the `.type`
   454	                    # field from each structured graph blocker; preserve the full
   455	                    # objects in graph_blocker_detail_json for operator inspection.
   456	                    blocked_by_json = JSON.stringify(graph_blockers_json.map(b => typeof b === "string" ? b : (b && b.type) || "graph_blocker"))
   457	                    blocked_by_csv = graph_blockers_csv
   458	                    graph_blocker_detail_json = graph_blockers_json
   459	                    recovery_strategy = "Resolve review coverage-graph blockers before stopping."
   460	               c) if STOP is legal AND graph_decision == "CONTINUE":
   461	                    decision = "CONTINUE"
   462	                    stop_blocked = false
   463	                    reason = "graph_convergence_continue"
   464	               d) else keep the existing STUCK_RECOVERY or CONTINUE outcome
   465	        outputs:
   466	          - decision: "STOP | BLOCKED | STUCK_RECOVERY | CONTINUE"
   467	          - reason: "Human-readable stop reason"
   468	          - stop_blocked: "Boolean true when STOP is vetoed by inline legal-stop gates or graph_decision == STOP_BLOCKED"
   469	          - blocked_by_json: "JSON array of failed legal-stop gates when decision == BLOCKED"
   470	          - blocked_by_csv: "Comma-separated list of failed legal-stop gates when decision == BLOCKED"
   471	          - convergence_gate_pass: "Boolean pass/fail for convergenceGate"
   472	          - convergence_gate_score: "Numeric score recorded for convergenceGate"
   473	          - dimension_coverage_gate_pass: "Boolean pass/fail for dimensionCoverageGate"
   474	          - dimension_coverage_gate_covered_json: "JSON array of covered review dimensions"
   475	          - dimension_coverage_gate_missing_json: "JSON array of missing review dimensions"
   476	          - p0_resolution_gate_pass: "Boolean pass/fail for p0ResolutionGate"
   477	          - active_p0_count: "Active P0 finding count at stop-check time"
   478	          - evidence_density_gate_pass: "Boolean pass/fail for evidenceDensityGate"
   479	          - avg_evidence_per_finding: "Numeric evidence density for active findings"
   480	          - hotspot_saturation_gate_pass: "Boolean pass/fail for hotspotSaturationGate"
   481	          - claim_adjudication_gate_pass: "Boolean pass/fail for claimAdjudicationGate (false vetoes STOP)"
   482	          - claim_adjudication_active_count: "Count of active P0/P1 findings evaluated by claimAdjudicationGate"
   483	          - graph_decision: "CONTINUE | STOP_ALLOWED | STOP_BLOCKED from step_graph_convergence"
   484	          - graph_signals_json: "JSON object returned by graph convergence"
   485	          - graph_blockers_json: "JSON array of graph blockers"
   486	          - graph_blockers_csv: "Comma-separated graph blocker summary"
   487	          - recovery_strategy: "One-line hint describing the next review action when decision == BLOCKED or STUCK_RECOVERY"
   488	
   489	      step_emit_blocked_stop:
   490	        action: "Persist blocked-stop evidence whenever the review legal-stop decision tree vetoes STOP"
   491	        if_blocked:
   492	          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"blocked_stop","mode":"review","run":{current_iteration},"blockedBy":{blocked_by_json},"gateResults":{"convergenceGate":{"pass":{convergence_gate_pass},"score":{convergence_gate_score}},"dimensionCoverageGate":{"pass":{dimension_coverage_gate_pass},"covered":{dimension_coverage_gate_covered_json},"missing":{dimension_coverage_gate_missing_json}},"p0ResolutionGate":{"pass":{p0_resolution_gate_pass},"activeP0":{active_p0_count}},"evidenceDensityGate":{"pass":{evidence_density_gate_pass},"avgEvidencePerFinding":{avg_evidence_per_finding}},"hotspotSaturationGate":{"pass":{hotspot_saturation_gate_pass}},"claimAdjudicationGate":{"pass":{claim_adjudication_gate_pass},"activeP0P1":{claim_adjudication_active_count}}},"graphBlockerDetail":{graph_blockers_json},"recoveryStrategy":"{recovery_strategy}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{session_id}","generation":{generation}}'
   493	          log: "Blocked STOP persisted for review loop. Failed gates: {blocked_by_csv}. Recovery strategy: {recovery_strategy}"
   494	        if_not_blocked:
   495	          proceed: true
   496	
   497	      step_handle_convergence:
   498	        action: "Act on convergence decision"
   499	        if_stop:
   500	          log: "Loop stopping. Reason: {reason}"
   501	          skip_to: phase_synthesis
   502	        if_blocked:
   503	          log: "Legal-stop gates blocked STOP. Failed gates: {blocked_by_csv}. Continuing review."
   504	        if_stuck_recovery:
   505	          log: "Stuck detected ({stuck_count} consecutive no-progress). Entering recovery."
   506	          recovery_strategies:
   507	            - "Change granularity: file-level → function-level → line-level review"
   508	            - "Traceability protocol replay: re-run unresolved core or overlay checks"
   509	            - "Escalate severity review: re-examine P2 findings for potential P1 upgrades"
   510	          pivot_target: "Pivot to the least-covered dimension (the review dimension with the fewest iteration passes and lowest coverage ratio)."
   511	          set:
   512	            next_dimension: "RECOVERY: {recovery_strategy}. Least-covered dimension: {least_explored}"
   513	            pending_stop_event: "stuck_recovery"
   514	            pending_stop_reason: "stuckRecovery"
   515	            pending_stop_detail: "Recovery path activated after repeated no-progress iterations"
   516	          reset: { stuck_count: 0 }
   517	        if_continue:
   518	          log: "Iteration {current_iteration}: Continuing. Dimension: {next_dimension}"
   519	
   520	      step_normalize_pause_events:

   394	      step_graph_convergence:
   395	        action: "Evaluate coverage-graph convergence before the inline review convergence vote"
   396	        inspect:
   397	          - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-state.jsonl"
   398	          - "{spec_folder}/review/deep-review-findings-registry.json"
   399	        transform: |
   400	          1. Call graph convergence on the current review lineage before the inline 3-signal vote.
   401	          2. Record the decision as one of CONTINUE, STOP_ALLOWED, STOP_BLOCKED.
   402	          3. Preserve raw graph signals and blockers for reducer rollup and blocked-stop evidence.
   403	          4. Normalize blockers to both JSON array and CSV forms for downstream stop handling.
   404	          5. Set graph_stop_blocked = true only when graph_decision == "STOP_BLOCKED".
   405	        mcp_tool:
   406	          name: mcp__spec_kit_memory__deep_loop_graph_convergence
   407	          note: "Call directly - NEVER through Code Mode. Review-side graph convergence must run before the inline review stop vote."
   408	          parameters: { specFolder: "{spec_folder}", loopType: "review", sessionId: "{session_id}" }
   409	        append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"graph_convergence","mode":"review","run":{current_iteration},"decision":"{graph_decision}","signals":{graph_signals_json},"blockers":{graph_blockers_json},"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{session_id}","generation":{generation}}'
   410	        outputs:

   413	          - graph_blockers_json: "JSON array of graph blockers when present, else []"
   414	          - graph_blockers_csv: "Comma-separated blocker summary when graph blocks STOP, else empty string"
   415	          - graph_stop_blocked: "Boolean true when graph_decision == STOP_BLOCKED"
   416	
   417	      step_check_convergence:
   418	        action: "Evaluate graph-assisted review stop conditions and the legal-stop decision tree"
   419	        algorithm: |
   420	          0. CLAIM-ADJUDICATION PRE-CHECK (universal STOP veto; runs before hard stops and composite convergence):
   421	             claim_adjudication_gate_pass = (last_claim_adjudication_passed != false) OR (p0_count + p1_count == 0)
   422	             If claim_adjudication_gate_pass == false:
   423	               candidate_decision = "BLOCKED"
   424	               stop_blocked = true
   425	               stopReason = "blockedStop"
   426	               blocked_gates = ["claimAdjudicationGate"]
   427	               recovery_strategy = "Reviewer must add typed claim-adjudication packets (claim, evidenceRefs, counterevidenceSought, alternativeExplanation, finalSeverity, confidence, downgradeTrigger) for every active P0/P1 finding before STOP is allowed."
   428	               Skip hard stops (1) and composite convergence (4); proceed directly to step 5 legal-stop decision-tree assembly so blocked_by_json, gate outputs, and the blocked_stop event still populate consistently.
   429	          1. HARD STOPS (each still subject to step 5 legal-stop gates, including claimAdjudicationGate):
   430	             a) if iteration_count >= max_iterations: mark hard_stop_reason = "max_iterations_reached" and promote to STOP candidate
   431	             b) if all dimensions clean AND required traceability protocols are covered AND p0_count == 0 AND p1_count == 0 AND coverage_age >= 1 AND all quality gates pass (evidence: every P0/P1 has file:line; scope: all findings within target; coverage: all dimensions reviewed): mark hard_stop_reason = "all_dimensions_clean" and promote to STOP candidate
   432	             A hard stop does NOT bypass the legal-stop decision tree; it must still pass step 5 including the claim-adjudication gate.
   433	          2. STUCK DETECTION (threshold 2):
   434	             if stuck_count >= 2: STUCK_RECOVERY
   435	          3. GRAPH CONVERGENCE PREREQUISITE:
   436	               graph_decision, graph_signals_json, and graph_blockers_json are already populated by step_graph_convergence.
   437	               Final STOP is never legal unless the inline review vote says STOP AND graph_decision == "STOP_ALLOWED".
   438	               If graph_decision == "STOP_BLOCKED", set stop_blocked = true and route through blocked_stop emission instead of stopping.
   439	          4. COMPOSITE CONVERGENCE (3-signal weighted vote with split thresholds):
   440	               signals = []
   441	               a) Rolling average (w=0.30, window=2, needs 2+ iterations):
   442	                  avg = mean(last 2 newFindingsRatios)
   443	                  stop if avg <= 0.08
   444	               b) MAD noise floor (w=0.25, needs 3+ iterations):
   445	                  noiseFloor = MAD(all ratios) * 1.4826
   446	                  stop if latest ratio <= noiseFloor
   447	               c) Dimension coverage (w=0.45):
   448	                  coverage = dimensions_covered / total_dimensions
   449	                  stop if coverage >= 1.0 AND required traceability protocols are covered AND coverage_age >= 1
   450	               Redistribute weights for unavailable signals.
   451	               if latest ratio <= 0.05: mark no_progress_threshold_reached
   452	               if weighted_stop_score >= 0.60: inline STOP becomes a candidate and binary gates must run
   453	          5. LEGAL-STOP DECISION TREE (review-specific gates; runs whenever step 0 or a hard stop or the composite vote promotes STOP to a candidate):
   454	               a) convergenceGate: pass when a hard-stop condition is met OR weighted_stop_score >= 0.60; record score
   455	               b) dimensionCoverageGate: pass when configured dimensions and required traceability coverage are complete and coverage_age >= 1; record covered and missing dimensions
   456	               c) p0ResolutionGate: pass when activeP0 == 0; record activeP0
   457	               d) evidenceDensityGate: pass when every active P0/P1 has concrete file:line evidence and no active P0/P1 relies only on inference; record avgEvidencePerFinding
   458	               e) hotspotSaturationGate: pass when review hotspots have been revisited enough times to satisfy the saturation heuristic
   459	               f) claimAdjudicationGate: pass when claim_adjudication_gate_pass == true (i.e. last_claim_adjudication_passed != false OR there are no active P0/P1 findings to adjudicate); record last_claim_adjudication_passed and claim_adjudication_active_count
   460	             if STOP is a candidate and any gate fails:
   461	               decision = "BLOCKED"
   462	               stop_blocked = true
   463	               stopReason = "blockedStop"
   464	               blocked_by_json = JSON array of failing gate names (always include "claimAdjudicationGate" when claim_adjudication_gate_pass == false)

   466	               convergence_gate_pass = boolean

   468	               dimension_coverage_gate_pass = boolean
   469	               dimension_coverage_gate_covered_json = JSON array of covered review dimensions
   470	               dimension_coverage_gate_missing_json = JSON array of missing review dimensions

   128	      step_classify_session:
   129	        action: "Classify the session before writing files"
   130	        inspect:
   131	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-config.json"
   132	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-state.jsonl"
   133	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-strategy.md"
   134	        classify:
   135	          fresh: "None of the three state artifacts exist"
   136	          resume: "Config, JSONL, and strategy all exist and agree on topic/spec folder"
   137	          completed-session: "Resume artifacts exist and config.status == 'complete'"
   138	          invalid-state: "Any partial, missing, or contradictory combination"
   139	        outputs:
   140	          - session_state: "fresh | resume | completed-session | invalid-state"
   141	        on_resume:
   142	          show_dashboard: "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-dashboard.md"
   143	          ask: "Existing research session is consistent. Resume where it left off, or restart (archive the current research/ tree and start a fresh session)?"
   144	          options: [resume, restart, cancel]
   145	          on_resume_choice:
   146	            set:
   147	              lineage_mode: "resume"
   148	              parent_session_id: "{session_id}"
   149	            append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"resumed","mode":"research","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{session_id}","lineageMode":"resume","continuedFromRun":{iteration_count},"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","generation":{generation}}'
   150	            skip_to: gate_init_approval
   151	          on_restart_choice:
   152	            archive: "{spec_folder}/research -> {spec_folder}/research_archive/{timestamp_slug}"
   153	            set:
   154	              lineage_mode: "restart"
   155	              parent_session_id: "{prior_session_id}"
   156	              generation: "{prior_generation + 1}"
   157	            append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"restarted","mode":"research","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{prior_session_id}","lineageMode":"restart","generation":{generation},"archivedPath":"{spec_folder}/research_archive/{timestamp_slug}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   158	            skip_to: step_create_config
   159	          on_cancel_choice:
   160	            halt: true
   161	            message: "Research session preserved. Manually archive or edit research/ before re-running."
   162	          note: "fork and completed-continue branches are deferred. The reducer still reads `lineageMode` from config for dashboards and analysis, but only `new`, `resume`, and `restart` are runtime-supported in this release.    163	        on_completed_session:

   167	        on_invalid_state:

   549	
   550	      step_update_tracking:

   552	        set:

   555

   559	
   560	      # ─── WAVE ORCHESTRATION ───
   561	      # Wave mode is auto-only and conflicts with per-iteration approval gates.

   563	
   564	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   565	  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS
   566	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   567	  phase_synthesis:
   568	    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into final research/research.md
   569	    steps:
   570	
   571	      step_hydrate_summary_metrics:
   572	        action: "Hydrate summary metrics before synthesis"
   573	        read:

   575	          - "{spec_folder}/research/deep-research-state.jsonl"

1. `FIXED` Deep-review blocked-stop payload now preserves `graphBlockerDetail` in both workflow variants. The blocked-stop emission includes `graphBlockerDetail:{graph_blockers_json}` in [spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml:489) and [spec_kit_deep-review_confirm.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_confirm.yaml:522). The stop logic also preserves structured blocker objects before emission at [spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml:452) and [spec_kit_deep-review_confirm.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_confirm.yaml:485).

2. `FIXED` Deep-review `reviewDimensions` normalization is now single-source and reused for both config and JSONL. The normalization step is explicit at [spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml:234) and [spec_kit_deep-review_confirm.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_confirm.yaml:242); the normalized value is then reused in config/state creation at [spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml:246), [spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_auto.yaml:279), [spec_kit_deep-review_confirm.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_confirm.yaml:254), and [spec_kit_deep-review_confirm.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-review_confirm.yaml:287).

3. `FIXED` Deep-research no longer routes completed sessions straight to synthesis. Both workflows now halt and instruct the operator to archive/replace the packet at [spec_kit_deep-research_auto.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-research_auto.yaml:155) and [spec_kit_deep-research_confirm.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-research_confirm.yaml:163). `phase_synthesis` remains reachable only from normal loop-stop handling at [spec_kit_deep-research_auto.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-research_auto.yaml:348) and [spec_kit_deep-research_confirm.yaml](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/command/spec_kit/assets/spec_kit_deep-research_confirm.yaml:377).

4. `FIXED` `agent/deep-review.md` now presents a single canonical iteration skeleton and explicitly forbids alternate section shapes. The exact iteration sequence is collapsed at [deep-review.md](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/agent/deep-review.md:47), and the canonical `iteration-NNN.md` contract is enforced at [deep-review.md](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/agent/deep-review.md:148).

5. `PARTIAL` `agent/deep-research.md` now includes config in the detailed Step 1 read list, but the top-level “exact sequence” still describes Step 1 as only “Read JSONL + strategy.md,” so the canonical summary and the detailed instructions still disagree.

**Partial Finding**

`F-026-901`  
Severity: `P2`  
Dimension: `security`  
File: [deep-research.md](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/agent/deep-research.md:55)  
Title: Step-1 summary still omits config despite the detailed protocol requiring it  
Description: The fix was only partially applied. The detailed Step 1 correctly requires reading `research/deep-research-config.json`, but the top-level “Every iteration follows this exact sequence” block still says Step 1 is “Read JSONL + strategy.md.” Because that summary is presented as the exact canonical sequence, it can still mislead implementers or future fix batches into skipping config-dependent lifecycle rules.  
Evidence: Summary sequence omits config at [deep-research.md](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/agent/deep-research.md:52) and [deep-research.md](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/agent/deep-research.md:55). Detailed Step 1 includes config at [deep-research.md](/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/agent/deep-research.md:66).  
Recommendation: Update the top-level sequence so Step 1 explicitly says config is read first or as part of the state read, matching the detailed protocol exactly.
